data.title: Tether CEO Describes USDT As Key Ally To Dollar Dominance
data.description: According to Odaily, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino stated on the X platform that USDT serves as the best ally to the dominance of the U.S. dollar.

data.title: An ancient whale sold 6,672 ETH again after seven months
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to ai_9684xtpa monitoring, the "Ancient Whale of Ethereum ICO 100,000 $ETH" sold 6,672 ETH again after seven months, worth $18.08 million. The whale transferred 11,672 ETH to the new address 0xe92...f1c0e four hours ago, and then recharged 6,672 ETH into Kraken, with its ETH cost as low as $0.31. The wallet currently still holds 5,000 ETH, which may be sold in the near future.

data.title: A whale transferred about 500,000 $OM to Binance, worth about $2.73 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On-chain data shows that a whale transferred 500,090.59 $OM to Binance, worth about $2,735,495.53.
It is reported that the whale received about 3.5 million $OM tokens in the past three months, worth about $14 million.

data.title: Security Concerns Arise Over U.S. Government Efficiency Department's Website
data.description: According to Odaily, the website of the U.S. Government Efficiency Department, led by Elon Musk, is reportedly facing security issues. The site, which primarily tracks federal government spending cuts, appears to be sourcing data from a database that can be edited by anyone. This raises concerns about the accuracy and reliability of the information provided on the platform.

data.title: The DOGE website of the US government efficiency department led by Musk is suspected of having data security issues
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The DOGE website of the U.S. government efficiency department led by Musk is suspected of having security issues. The website mainly tracks federal government spending cuts, but the extracted data seems to come from a database that anyone can edit. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Gate.io announces upgrade of sub-accounts to improve user experience
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Gate.io has completed the upgrade of the number of ordinary sub-accounts and escrow sub-accounts under all platform user accounts on February 14, 2025 (UTC+8). Currently, VIP0 certified users are allowed to create sub-accounts. It is reported that a sub-account is a type of account opened by users on Gate.io. Users can create multiple sub-accounts and bind them to the main account to practice different trading strategies and reduce risks.
Upgrade details
User level VIP0-VIP4: The number of ordinary sub-accounts is upgraded to 10, and the number of escrow sub-accounts is upgraded to 10;
User level VIP5-VIP9: The number of ordinary sub-accounts is upgraded to 30, and the number of escrow sub-accounts is upgraded to 30.

data.title: U.S. retail sales monthly rate in January was -0.9%, expected to be -0.1%, and the previous value was revised to 0.7%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: US retail sales monthly rate in January was -0.9%, expected -0.1%, and the previous value was revised from 0.40% to 0.7%.
US retail sales control group in January was -0.8%, expected 0.3%, and the previous value was revised from 0.70% to 0.8%.
US core retail sales monthly rate in January was -0.4%, expected 0.3%, and the previous value was revised from 0.40% to 0.7%. (Jinshi)

data.title: The monthly rate of U.S. retail sales in January was the largest drop since January 2024, and DXY fell nearly 15 points in the short term
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The monthly rate of retail sales in the United States in January was -0.9%, the largest drop since January 2024. The US dollar index DXY fell nearly 15 points in the short term and is now at 106.76. (Jinshi)

data.title: Grayscale Moves Forward with XRP & DOGE ETFs – SEC Review Begins
data.description:
TL;DR Grayscale files for XRP and DOGE ETFs, and the SEC begins a 240-day review process. XRP’s improved legal standing post-2023 court ruling may strengthen its ETF case, while DOGE faces regulatory scrutiny. Market reactions are positive, but experts caution that SEC acknowledgment does not guarantee approval. Grayscale Investments has taken a significant step toward ... 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/grayscale-moves-forward-with-xrp-doge-etfs-sec-review-begins/

data.title: zkLend releases post-mortem analysis of security incident: fair and appropriate compensation plan will be formulated
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News zkLend released a post-event analysis of the security incident on the X platform, which pointed out that zkLend was attacked from February 11, resulting in a loss of approximately $9.6 million in funds: 1. Before considering restarting the protocol, the security team and auditors will deploy security patches and conduct a thorough review. 2. Continue to work with zeroShadow to track further fund flows. 3. Will regularly provide transparent updates to the community on the progress of the situation and measures taken to protect user funds. 4. Will collect suggestions and feedback from the community in the future to develop a fair and appropriate compensation plan.
